text: Science has a clearer story about transfer of learning than social media does. Transfer of learning means applying knowledge from one context to another. But did you know its effectiveness varies greatly? Studies show it’s more effective when the similarities between contexts are clear. So, understanding how we learn can unlock our potential. Want more insights on learning? Hit follow and explore the science!
